review_findings.D1_module_scope_variable: PASS - lastOutputTail declared at module scope with @internal JSDoc, correct type (string | null), initialized to null. References [S2-004] pattern.
review_findings.D2_001_tail_extraction: PASS - lines split once, tailForDedup from slice(-50).join, isDuplicate comparison. Lines reuse documented [S1-004][S2-001].
review_findings.D2_003_cache_update: PASS - lastOutputTail = tailForDedup placed before detection logic, after log guard.
review_findings.D2_004_multipleChoice_log_guard: PASS - logger.info('detectPrompt:multipleChoice') wrapped in if (!isDuplicate), return statement unconditional.
review_findings.D2_005_complete_log_guard: PASS - logger.debug('detectPrompt:complete') wrapped in if (!isDuplicate), return statement unconditional.
review_findings.D3_reset_function: PASS - resetDetectPromptCache() exported with @internal JSDoc, sets lastOutputTail to null.
review_findings.D4_001_return_value_invariance: PASS - isDuplicate never gates any return statement. All 4 return paths (multipleChoice, yesNo, approve, noPrompt) are unconditional with respect to isDuplicate.
review_findings.D4_002_detection_logic_unaffected: PASS - isDuplicate is only used in log guard conditions, never in detection logic branches.
review_findings.D4_003_single_cache_entry: PASS - Only one variable (lastOutputTail), no Map/Set/Array growth.
review_findings.D4_004_internal_export: PASS - resetDetectPromptCache marked @internal, JSDoc says 'Intended for test isolation only'.
review_findings.S1_001_SRP_tradeoff_comment: PASS - Lines 193-196 contain explicit SRP tradeoff comment with future extraction guidance.
review_findings.S2_004_hot_reload_comment: PASS - Lines 17-19 in lastOutputTail JSDoc explain Hot Reload reset acceptability for log-only caching.
review_findings.S3_001_test_beforeEach_reset: PASS - prompt-detector.test.ts has resetDetectPromptCache() in root beforeEach.
review_findings.S3_009_status_detector_test_reset: PASS - status-detector.test.ts has resetDetectPromptCache() in beforeEach.
review_findings.T1_same_output_suppression: PASS - Test covers same output duplicate suppression.
review_findings.T1b_multipleChoice_suppression: PASS - Test covers multiple choice log suppression.
review_findings.T2_different_output_logs: PASS - Test verifies different output produces logs.
review_findings.T3_return_value_identical: PASS - Test verifies structural equality between cache miss and hit. T3b covers no-prompt case.
review_findings.T4_reset_restores_logging: PASS - Test verifies resetDetectPromptCache() restores log emission.
review_findings.T5_test_isolation: PASS - Test verifies beforeEach isolation from prior test state.

message: Code review complete. Implementation fully conforms to design policy D1-D4, S1-001, S2-004, S3-001/S3-009 requirements. All test categories T1-T5 are covered. No refactoring changes needed -- code is already clean, well-documented, and correctly structured. TypeScript: 0 errors. ESLint: 0 errors. Prompt-detector tests: 181 passed. Status-detector tests: 18 passed.
